description: Replace em dash with plain hyphen, or delete if the clause adds nothing
before: Vendor consolidation is the priority — it drives the fastest savings.
after: Vendor consolidation is the priority - it drives the fastest savings.

description: Replace em dash in headings/labels with a plain hyphen
Break rhetorical triads — reduce to two items or flatten
before: The program is fast, flexible, and future-proof.
after: The program delivers savings within FY26.

description: Rewrite sentences with long preamble to lead with the claim
before: To address the challenges arising from fragmented procurement across the Telco division, it is essential that we consider a consolidated vendor panel approach.
after: A consolidated vendor panel will reduce procurement fragmentation in Telco.
trigger_regex: (?i)^(to |in order to |given that |in light of |as a result of ).{50,}

description: Flatten parallel tricolon conclusions to a single direct claim
before: This approach is efficient, effective, and scalable.
after: This approach delivers results at Ventia's scale.
